name: More Lore Expansion
description: Hey guys did you know that the three Daemons pillars in the Rain World: The Watcher DLC Daemon sequence<LINE> during the final ending represent the three canons, vanilla, Rain World: Downpour and Rain World: The Watcher?<LINE> I know this is pretty cool, so creative and daring of Videocult and Akupara Games to introduce this neat piece of lore and
